title: fagraea involucrata
intro: Fagraea involucrata, also known as the Frangipani tree, is a species of evergreen flowering tree in the family Gentianaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Fagraea involucrata include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as the common cold and bronchitis. Fagraea involucrata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health issues.
